description: All images required for Printing Services. Place images in the local generated_images/ folder and commit via git.
naming_convention: Service name with spaces replaced by underscores, '&' replaced by 'and', '/' replaced by '-', commas removed. Extension: .webp

images.image_prompt: Large format digital printer producing a vibrant colorful flex banner, printing machine in action with vivid graphics rolling out, professional print shop interior, rolls of flex material stacked nearby, bright industrial lighting, commercial photography, 16:9 landscape aspect ratio
